title: Execution of a 'Store Word' Instruction
description: A flowchart depicting the sequence of steps and data movements within a CPU for storing a word from a register into memory.
relationships: PC sends address to Instruction Memory
Instruction Memory sends instruction opcode to IR
IR sends opcode to Control Unit
Control Unit sends control signals to all components
IR sends register address to Register File
Register File sends data to MDR
IR sends offset to ALU for address calculation
ALU calculates effective address and sends to MAR
MAR sends address to Main Memory
MDR sends data to Main Memory for storage
